enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog after forgetting to post for the day. He recaps watching a TV show called 'The Islander' (compared to Spartacus) at his mom's house the night before, mentions working on his website, and discusses a creative world-building project called 'Sanctumoni' that he develops mentally rather than in writing.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: prefers building the world mentally rather than writing it down, trusting it ties together in his head
enjoys it as drama-filled entertainment, compares it to Spartacus
likes them because he can research and analyze the subject matter afterward
